chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 312 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنْ قَلَّمَ أَظْفَارَهُ يَوْمَ اَلسَّبْتِ وَ يَوْمَ اَلْخَمِيسِ وَ أَخَذَ مِنْ شَارِبِهِ عُوفِيَ مِنْ وَجَعِ اَلضِّرْسِ وَ وَجَعِ اَلْعَيْنِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.312 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Whoever trims their nails on Saturday and Thursday and trims their mustache will be protected from toothache and eye pain."
